response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data, and systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, RAG/vector DB implementation, or direct enterprise GenAI consulting, which are core to the role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven ability to lead technical projects across diverse stacks and domains (cloud, data, embedded)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and frameworks
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI/GenAI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in enterprise contexts
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise cloud deployment experience
